name: tool-inventory
description: Manage tool registries with embedded ChromaDB for semantic tool discovery — self-contained with vendored RLM scripts. V2 upgrades include strict Negative Constraints preventing manual OS search.

integrates.note: Vendors RLM scripts (distiller, query_cache, cleanup_cache, rlm_config, inventory) for tool-scoped operations. The rlm-factory plugin handles docs-only cache separately.
